localCachePolicy: raw archives and extracted LUT files are local-only and ignored by Git

downloaded.name: Sony Cine LUTs
downloaded.notes: Public Sony Cine resource page with individual .cube.zip downloads for VENICE/BURANO style and monitoring LUTs.

downloaded.name: ARRI LogC3 / LogC4 LUT Packages
downloaded.notes: Official ARRI LogC3 and LogC4 .cube color-space conversion packages.

downloaded.name: Panasonic V-Log / V-Gamut to V-709 LUT
downloaded.notes: Official Panasonic package containing .cube and camera .vlt variants.

pendingManualReview.name: Sony Official Look Profile / LUT Library
pendingManualReview.reason: Sony support page lists S-Gamut/S-Log2 and S-Gamut3.Cine/S-Log3 downloads, but direct archive URLs were not exposed in non-JavaScript HTML.

pendingManualReview.name: Color Grading Central Free LUTs
pendingManualReview.reason: Current page delivers LUTs through CineDream's installer/export workflow rather than direct .cube archives.

pendingManualReview.name: FixThePhoto Free LUTs
pendingManualReview.reason: Free .cube packs are listed, but redistribution/use terms should be reviewed before bundling.

pendingManualReview.name: ON1 Free LUTs
pendingManualReview.reason: ON1 download flow requires JavaScript/email submission.

pendingManualReview.name: PremiumBeat Free LUT Roundup
pendingManualReview.reason: Roundup points to multiple third-party packs; each source should be reviewed individually before download or bundling.
